_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=95 (set at 95.59 after kpi operatingLeverage boundary pin + seededNoise unreachable-fallback pragma, buffer 0.59). The ratchet is non-decreasing: bump these up as the score climbs further, never lower.
